name: oura-mcp
description: Ask your Oura Ring about sleep, readiness, activity, stress and heart rate - in ChatGPT-grade chat, in any language.

oura_client_id.title: Oura app client ID
oura_client_id.description: From your own (free) Oura app at developer.ouraring.com/applications - register it with redirect URI http://localhost:8888/callback. Leave both fields empty to try the demo with fake sandbox data.

oura_client_secret.title: Oura app client secret
oura_client_secret.description: Client secret of the same Oura app. Stored in your OS keychain.
